_README: Copy to docs/acculynx_reference.json and fill from AccuLynx's own reports. These are the parity yardstick. Counts = totals AccuLynx shows for each entity; financials = lifetime $ totals. Then run: python scripts/parity_compare.py
_financials_note: From AccuLynx reports: contract_value=Job Profitability/Sales Pipeline; invoiced+balance=Invoice Report; collected = invoiced - balance (do NOT use the 90-day Payments Received report). payments optional.
